bench_setup.notes: EXTI trigger: PB0 (output) drives repeated rising edges, PB1 -> EXTI1 IRQ7. PASS after 10 interrupts; FAIL if 10 interrupts are not observed within the bounded pulse window. detail0 = interrupt count. AFIO_EXTICR1[7:4]=0x1 routes PB1 to EXTI1; PB1 is configured as input pull-down for a deterministic idle low.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull. Wire: PB0 -> PB1.
EXTI1, input pull-down. Wire: PB0 -> PB1.
